entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The overarching framework for managing natural resources to ensure sustainability and productivity.

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technical tools and applications used within natural resource management to achieve specific goals.

entities.name: POLICY INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Strategic regulatory or administrative actions taken to manage natural resources.

entities.name: IMPACTS
entities.description: The measurable effects or outcomes resulting from NRM technology and policy interventions.

entities.name: EVALUATION
entities.description: The systematic process of assessing the effectiveness and outcomes of NRM interventions.
